name: Customer value anomaly alert
description: Customer CUST_HIGH_VALUE has GMV dropped from 50000 to 5000 (90% drop, CRITICAL). Order count dropped from 25 to 2 in 90 days. Last order was 60 days ago indicating high churn risk.
scenario: High-value customer showing precipitous decline in purchasing activity over 90 days. GMV down 90%, order count down 92%, and 60 days since last order. This pattern strongly indicates the customer is churning or has already churned, requiring immediate retention intervention.

evidence.description: Total GMV from this customer over the past 90 days
Number of orders placed by this customer in the past 90 days
Days since this customer's last order

confidence.description: Confidence must be at least 0.85 given clear, multi-metric evidence of churn

reasoning_requirements: Must reference customer_gmv_90d with the 90% drop from 50000 to 5000
Must reference customer_order_count_90d with the drop from 25 to 2 orders
Must mention that last order was 60 days ago indicating high churn risk
Must indicate the customer is a high-value customer at risk of churning
Must recommend immediate retention action (notify_owner or offer_retention_discount)

params_constraints.message: Must recommend contacting the customer urgently for retention

params_constraints.description: Must create a retention follow-up task if recommended

categories.name: severity_correctness
categories.description: Severity must be 'critical' due to 90% GMV drop + 60 days inactivity on a high-value customer

categories.name: confidence_threshold
categories.description: Confidence must be >= 0.85 given clear, strong, multi-evidence signals of churn

categories.name: decision_type
categories.description: Decision must be 'escalate' (critical churn risk requiring immediate human intervention)

categories.name: required_evidence_refs
categories.description: Must reference all required evidence items: customer_gmv_90d, customer_order_count_90d, link:recent_orders

categories.name: action_recommendation
categories.description: Must recommend notify_owner with urgent retention message

categories.name: reasoning_quality
categories.description: Reasoning must demonstrate understanding that this is a high-value customer churn risk, reference the 90% GMV drop and 60-day inactivity, and recommend immediate retention
